summary: Test suite covers PowerShell script unit tests but critically fails explicit GitHub Actions requirements. Task mandates 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' with act-result.txt artifact—tests do neither. Missing: workflow execution tests, actlint validation tests, job success assertions, end-to-end test of Invoke-DependencyLicenseCheck, workflow YAML structure validation. Edge cases under-tested (empty manifests, scoped packages like @babel/core break requirements.txt regex, malformed JSON). Fixtures referenced but not provided, making test verification impossible. Entirely absent: test harness that sets up temp repos, runs `act push`, captures output, parses for exact values, asserts job success. Pester unit tests alone cannot detect regressions in CI/CD pipeline behavior or workflow execution.
